channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Russia Fired Record 8,150 Drones At Ukraine In May: Report

media:content.media:description: Russia launched one of its worst attacks on Kyiv in months in May

item.description: Russia also fired 211 missiles in May, among the highest monthly figures, at a time when Kyiv called on the United States for urgent help.
item.content:encoded: Russia also fired 211 missiles in May, among the highest monthly figures, at a time when Kyiv called on the United States for urgent help.

item.title: The Night Paris Plunged Into Chaos: Riots, Death, Mayhem Grip City Streets

media:content.media:description: A man waves a Paris Saint-Germain flag as a barricade burns in the 16th arrondissement of Paris.

item.description: Paris Saint-Germain retained the Champions League title on Saturday, beating Arsenal 4-3 on penalties in Budapest, but the joy of victory gave way to destruction on the streets of France's capital.
item.content:encoded: Paris Saint-Germain retained the Champions League title on Saturday, beating Arsenal 4-3 on penalties in Budapest, but the joy of victory gave way to destruction on the streets of France's capital.

item.title: US, Iran Keep Launching Attacks On Each Other As Negotiations Stall

media:content.media:description: Weeks of indirect talks have so far failed to agree an end to the war.

item.description: The latest exchange of fire coincided with Israel expanding its offensive into Lebanon, with Prime Minister Netanyahu vowing to push deeper into the country.
item.content:encoded: The latest exchange of fire coincided with Israel expanding its offensive into Lebanon, with Prime Minister Netanyahu vowing to push deeper into the country.

item.title: 'Made My Views Clear': Zohran Mamdani Skips Key Parade Celebrating Israel

media:content.media:description: Zohran Mamdani, NYC's first Muslim mayor, has remained steadfast in his pro-Palestinian advocacy.

item.description: The Israel Day parade has always been a must-attend event for mayors, governors and other political leaders eager to win over revelers.
item.content:encoded: The Israel Day parade has always been a must-attend event for mayors, governors and other political leaders eager to win over revelers.

item.title: Copycat Gangs, 1,000 Shooters: Inside Canada's 'Lawrence Bishnoi' Problem

media:content.media:description: Bishnoi has been in custody in India for around a decade

item.description: The person whose deportation hearing was underway before the Immigration and Refugee Board on Thursday is suspected to be a member of an Edmonton-based extortion gang linked to violence in at least three Canadian provinces.
item.content:encoded: The person whose deportation hearing was underway before the Immigration and Refugee Board on Thursday is suspected to be a member of an Edmonton-based extortion gang linked to violence in at least three Canadian provinces.

item.title: US-Iran war live updates: Iran Says Lebanon Ceasefire Key To Any Deal With US
item.description: US-Iran war live updates: The remark by Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf came as reports suggested US President Donald Trump has sent back a revised, tougher peace proposal
item.content:encoded: US-Iran war live updates: The remark by Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf came as reports suggested US President Donald Trump has sent back a revised, tougher peace proposal

item.title: Trump's Mount Rushmore Moment? AI Photo Shows Him With 4 US Presidents

media:content.media:description: Trump did not provide any comments on the post

item.description: The edited image depicts Trump standing alongside the faces of former US presidents George Washington, Thomas Jefferson, Theodore Roosevelt, and Abraham Lincoln.
item.content:encoded: The edited image depicts Trump standing alongside the faces of former US presidents George Washington, Thomas Jefferson, Theodore Roosevelt, and Abraham Lincoln.

item.title: Watch: Indian Ambassador Speaks Mandarin, Gives Tour Of Embassy In Beijing

media:content.media:description: The Ministry of External Affairs appointed Doraiswami as India's Ambassador to China in March

item.description: Vikram Doraiswami takes viewers on a tour of the embassy, explains the services it offers, and shows its different sections.
item.content:encoded: Vikram Doraiswami takes viewers on a tour of the embassy, explains the services it offers, and shows its different sections.

item.title: A Bachelor's In Rare Earths? China Has Schools For That

media:content.media:description: Rare earths can be difficult and costly to process.

item.description: Donald Trump and other Western leaders have pledged billions of dollars in investments to break China's chokehold on rare earths refining - a powerful lever Beijing has wielded in its trade war with Washington
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump and other Western leaders have pledged billions of dollars in investments to break China's chokehold on rare earths refining - a powerful lever Beijing has wielded in its trade war with Washington

item.title: How India-Oman Trade Pact Opens Alternative Route To Gulf Beyond Hormuz

media:content.media:description: India's imports from Oman surged by 246.4 per cent over the lasy year, rising from USD 430 million

item.description: The India-Omani CEPA comes into force amid the ongoing US-Iran war, which has severely disrupted the movement of ships in the international waters crossing the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: The India-Omani CEPA comes into force amid the ongoing US-Iran war, which has severely disrupted the movement of ships in the international waters crossing the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Opinion: Blog | 'I Lost 10 Kilos': Indian Student On Falling Rupee And The Reality Of Life Abroad
item.description: In October 2025, I paid the first instalment of my tuition fee. It was 15,800 pounds, and the conversion rate was Rs 118 for a pound. By January, it further slipped to Rs 125 as I paid the second instalment.
item.content:encoded: In October 2025, I paid the first instalment of my tuition fee. It was 15,800 pounds, and the conversion rate was Rs 118 for a pound. By January, it further slipped to Rs 125 as I paid the second instalment.

item.title: Want To Climb Everest? Here's How Much It Can Cost You

media:content.media:description: Largest share of budget goes towards transport, camps, oxygen cylinders, food, fixed ropes

item.description: The biggest expenses include permits, Sherpa support, specialised gear, oxygen supplies and logistics required for the climb.
item.content:encoded: The biggest expenses include permits, Sherpa support, specialised gear, oxygen supplies and logistics required for the climb.

item.title: "God Please Kill Him": Nurse Wishes For Trump's Assassination, Video Is Viral

media:content.media:description: Lee has been working as a registered nurse at the University of Michigan Medical Center

item.description: According to a screenshot of her LinkedIn profile shared online, Lee has been working as a registered nurse at the University of Michigan Medical Center since 2000.
item.content:encoded: According to a screenshot of her LinkedIn profile shared online, Lee has been working as a registered nurse at the University of Michigan Medical Center since 2000.

item.title: Why PM Balen Shah's India-Border Dispute Remarks Have Triggered Many In Nepal

media:content.media:description: Many Nepalese social media users also criticised the prime minister's comments

item.description: Nepal and India share a long and open border, much of which was defined by the 1816 Treaty of Sugauli. However, mapping remains incomplete in areas such as Susta and Limpiyadhura-Lipulekh-Kalapani.
item.content:encoded: Nepal and India share a long and open border, much of which was defined by the 1816 Treaty of Sugauli. However, mapping remains incomplete in areas such as Susta and Limpiyadhura-Lipulekh-Kalapani.

item.title: Kerala Man Wins Big In UK Job Dispute With Employer, Gets Rs 38 Lakh Payout

media:content.media:description: Shabin Shaji migrated to the UK as a care worker.

item.description: Recalling his experience, he explained that he was left completely broke and forced to rely on charity.
item.content:encoded: Recalling his experience, he explained that he was left completely broke and forced to rely on charity.

item.title: "Fire Reaches Eiffel Tower," Claims Viral Video. A Fact-Check

media:content.media:description: A fire broke near the banks of the Seine, sending thick clouds of smoke into the air.

item.description: The video shows the parts of the tower shrouded in thick black smoke, giving an illusion that the iconic tower itself is on fire.
item.content:encoded: The video shows the parts of the tower shrouded in thick black smoke, giving an illusion that the iconic tower itself is on fire.

item.title: 30 Or 16? Nigerian Politician Mahmud Sadis Buba Caught In Age Scandal

media:content.media:description: The document leak sparked widespread outrage.

item.description: Buba addressed his small body size by explaining that he has dwarfism, a condition he says he inherited from his paternal grandfather.
item.content:encoded: Buba addressed his small body size by explaining that he has dwarfism, a condition he says he inherited from his paternal grandfather.

item.title: Indian-Origin Pilot Dies In US Chopper Crash. He Got Married Just Hours Ago

media:content.media:description: Dave Fiji's new bride, Jessni, survived the crash

item.description: According to his father, Dave Fiji, a first officer for Delta Air Lines, had concerns about the weather before the takeoff.
item.content:encoded: According to his father, Dave Fiji, a first officer for Delta Air Lines, had concerns about the weather before the takeoff.

item.title: US Strikes Iran's Radar, Drone Control Sites In Goruk And Qeshm Islands

media:content.media:description: Centcom said that no US military personnel were harmed.

item.description: US says it struck Iranian radar and drone control sites over the weekend
item.content:encoded: US says it struck Iranian radar and drone control sites over the weekend

item.title: Malaysia Enforces Social Media Ban For Under-16, Platforms Must Verify Age

media:content.media:description: Parents whose children manage to bypass the law will not be penalized

item.description: The rules require social media platforms to implement age-verification systems and block users under 16 from creating accounts. They apply to platforms with at least 8 million users, including Facebook, Instagram, TikTok and YouTube.
item.content:encoded: The rules require social media platforms to implement age-verification systems and block users under 16 from creating accounts. They apply to platforms with at least 8 million users, including Facebook, Instagram, TikTok and YouTube.
